name: @gustavonline/warp-gateway
description: A tiny CLI gateway that lets Warp use ChatMock/Codex and local OpenAI-compatible LLMs through ngrok.

scripts.test: node --check src/cli.js && node --check src/server.js && node --check src/config.js && node --check src/adapters/openai-compatible.js && node --check src/commands/setup.js && node --check src/commands/run.js && node --check src/commands/start.js && node --check src/commands/status.js && node --check src/commands/logs.js && node --check src/commands/config.js && node --check src/commands/doctor.js && node --check src/commands/stop.js && node --check src/core/app-dirs.js && node --check src/core/config-store.js && node --check src/core/ngrok.js && node --check src/core/processes.js && node scripts/check-pack.js

author: Gustav Online
